title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the More Retail family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
